name: Donkey Kong Country
description: Donkey Kong platforming subseries focused on side-scrolling stages, animal buddies, collectibles, and jungle adventure.

eras.title: Rare Era
eras.description: The original SNES trilogy defines Donkey Kong's modern platforming identity.

eras.title: Retro Studios Era
eras.description: Retro Studios revives the Country formula with harder, more kinetic modern platformers.
